chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D- 2036 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of Case (Priority) 1.For orders on o/objections. 2.For hearing of CMA 7606/25 3.For hearing of main case 03-09-2025 Mr. Yaseen Ali Ghunio, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional A.G a/w Mushahid Hussain, DD (Legal), Sindh Public Service Commission..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- After arguing the matter at some length, counsel for the petitioners, under instructions, does not press the instant petition and submits that the petitioners will file their representations/appeals under Regulation No.161 of the Sindh Public Service Commission (Recruitment Management) Regulations, 2023. We observe that the prescribed period of 15 days for filing such appeals has already lapsed; however, the delay is condoned and the petitioners are allowed to file their representations/appeals within 15 days. The respondents are directed to decide the same within a period of one month, strictly in accordance with law. Accordingly, instant petition along with listed application is disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Ahmad
